name: Thumbnail Downloader
description: Download video thumbnails from YouTube, Vimeo, and Dailymotion.

name: Get Cookies
description: Export cookies for the current site as cookies.txt (Netscape format). Compatible with curl, wget, yt-dlp.

name: Media Downloader
description: Download YouTube videos and direct media files. Uses YouTube.js for signature decryption.

name: Realtime Subtitles
description: Real-time English subtitles for tab audio using Deepgram AI.

name: YouTube Downloader
description: Downloads YouTube videos with full nsig decoding. Tries multiple InnerTube clients.
